app.title: Smelly Loot
app.subtitle: Self-hosted loot distribution for FF XIV savage raid statics.

tiers.title: Tiers
tiers.description: Click a tier to open its loot tracker, history and settings. Use the plus card to roll over to a new tier.

newCard.title: New tier
newCard.description: Roll over to a new raid tier

newTier.title: Create a new tier
newTier.description: Creates the floor layout and buy costs from the Heavyweight defaults. The previously-active tier is archived but kept read-only.

maxIlv.label: Max iLv
maxIlv.help: Highest item level the tier can produce — typically the upgraded Savage piece.

roster.title: Team roster
roster.description: Manage your raiders' stable identity — name, main job, alt jobs, gear-tracker URL. Tier-specific data (BiS plan, pages, loot history) lives per-tier on the tier-detail page.

empty.title: No players on the team yet.
empty.description: Add your raiders. Once they're on the team you can pull them into each tier's roster as needed.
empty.noTeamPlayers: Add players to the team roster first, then assign them to this tier.

settings.title: Team settings
settings.description: Rename the static or change the default UI language.

locale.label: Default language
locale.description: Used for new sessions until the user picks one.

empty.title: No one in the tier roster yet.
empty.description: Pick from the team roster who's raiding this tier. Each added player gets a BiS table with current=Crafted defaults.
empty.noTeamPlayers: Add players to the team roster first, then assign them to this tier.

addDialog.title: Add players to tier
addDialog.description: Pick one or more team players. Each gets a 12-slot BiS table with current=Crafted and desired=NotPlanned.

players.title: Players
players.description: Manage who's on the static and what they main.

empty.title: No players yet.
empty.description: Add the eight raiders to start tracking gear and loot.

delete.title: Remove player?
delete.description: This deletes their BiS plan and unlinks any past loot drops they received. The drops themselves stay on record.

detail.noBis: No BiS plan recorded yet — set the desired source per slot below to get started.

pages.title: Pages by floor
pages.description: 1 page per boss kill. Adjust covers pre-tier carry-over, missed weeks, alliance pages, etc.

materials.title: Materials
materials.description: Upgrade tokens received vs needed for the BiS plan.

savage.title: Savage drops
savage.description: Gear drops awarded this tier (excludes materials and token purchases).

history.title: Loot history
history.description: Every recorded drop, grouped by week.
history.noDrops: No drops recorded for this week.

tierEdit.title: Tier configuration
tierEdit.description: Set the tier name and max iLv. The nine per-source iLvs are derived from the max via the standard FFXIV deltas (Savage = max, JustNo = max − 40).

maxIlv.label: Max iLv
maxIlv.help: Highest item level the tier can produce — typically the upgraded Savage piece.

loot.title: Loot distribution
loot.description: Plan future weeks and track this week's actual drops.

plan.title: Suggested timeline
plan.description: Recommended distribution for the next {weeksAhead} weeks per boss, computed from current BiS plans + page balances. Recomputes automatically as real drops are recorded in the Track tab.
plan.noPlayers: Add players first to plan a loot timeline.
plan.viaPagesHint: Player has enough pages to self-buy this slot.
plan.refreshHint: Recompute the plan from the latest snapshot. Edits made via the UI refresh automatically; this button is for direct DB changes or other browser tabs.

noWeeks.title: No raid weeks recorded yet.
noWeeks.description: Start the first raid week to begin tracking kills and loot.

drop.noEligible: No eligible recipient — every player is either covered by pages or doesn't want this drop.
drop.manualPickerDescription: All players sorted by algorithm score. Pick anyone — it'll be recorded as a manual override.
